opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tool detected on site or GMB profile.
opportunities.observation: After-hours HVAC calls in Boise winters are going directly to competitors with online booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling chatbot to capture and book service calls 24/7 without phone dependency.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 86 Google reviews at 4.3 stars with no detected owner response pattern or CRM tools.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal low engagement, risking reputation in Nampa's competitive HVAC market.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized review responses using AI trained on HVAC service context and local tone.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: Seasonal HVAC business with no email marketing tools or CRM detected on site.
opportunities.observation: Idaho's harsh winters and hot summers create two natural revenue windows being left untouched.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal tune-up reminders via SMS and email to convert past customers into recurring revenue.
